title: trifolium chlorotrichum
intro: Trifolium chlorotrichum, also known as the Yellow Bird's Foot Trefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Trifolium chlorotrichum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Trifolium chlorotrichum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
